title: Special Convening of ACE’s Faith-Based Commission Addresses “Learning to Disagree Better”
summary_en: A June 8 convening of ACE’s Commission on Faith-Based Colleges and Universities will bring together leaders to discuss the timely topic of how faith-based institutions can contribute to improving civic dialogue.
title_cn: 美国教育委员会信仰导向院校委员会召开特别会议 研讨“学习更好地表达不同意见”相关议题

title: ACE Names 31 Emerging Higher Education Leaders to ACE Fellows Program
summary_en: ACE has selected 31 emerging college and university leaders for the 2026-2027 class of the ACE Fellows Program.
title_cn: 美国教育理事会确定31名新兴高等教育领袖入选ACE研究员项目

title: ACE Webinar to Examine Mental Health Policy and Practice
summary_en: Register now for a May 27 ACE webinar that will bring together leading voices in mental health advocacy and trauma-informed care to explore the critical intersection of policy, practice, and student wellbeing.
title_cn: 美国教育理事会将举办网络研讨会研讨心理健康政策与实践相关议题

title: ACE, Higher Education Groups Urge Key Protections in Workforce Pell Rulemaking
summary_en: ACE joined more than 35 higher education associations in submitting comments to the Department of Education urging important revisions to its proposed rules implementing the Workforce Pell Grant program created under the One Big Beautiful Bill Act.
title_cn: 美国教育理事会联合高等教育团体呼吁在劳动力佩尔助学金规则制定中强化关键保障

title: Trump Administration Does Not Seek to Appeal to Supreme Court, Indirect Costs Cap Litigation Concluded
summary_en: The Trump administration did not seek to have the Supreme Court take up appeal of the Circuit Court decision, with the Department of Justice not meeting the deadline this month to make such a request.
title_cn: 特朗普政府未就科研间接成本上限诉讼提请最高法院审理 相关诉讼程序终结
